OpenAI 宣布关闭 Sora 应用

OpenAI Announces Shutting Down Sora

2026-03-26

OpenAI 宣布将关闭 Sora 应用，这款 AI 视频生成工具上线仅数月便停止服务。

这意味着什么？

对用户：Sora 用户创建的内容不会丢失，应用和 API 的具体关闭时间将稍后公布。

对行业：这是 OpenAI 在视频生成领域的重大调整，可能与竞争加剧或战略重心转移有关。

阅读原文：https://twitter.com/soraofficialapp/status/2036532795984715896

OpenAI announces it will shut down the Sora app, just months after launching the AI video generation tool.

What This Means

For users: Content created with Sora won't be lost. Timeline for app and API shutdown will be shared soon.

For the industry: This is a major adjustment in OpenAI's video generation strategy, possibly due to increased competition or shifting priorities.

Read the original post: https://twitter.com/soraofficialapp/status/2036532795984715896
